title: SendPaymentError::Db used for both DB and lightwalletd network errors
description: payment.rs maps client.latest_height() failures to SendPaymentError::Db (line 160) and store.scan_tip() failures to Db (line 159). Both are mapped identically. The Connect variant exists on SendPaymentError but is only used in send_fn_box (commands.rs LightwalletdClient::connect). A new operator troubleshooting a lightwalletd network issue during send_payment will see 'database error: <network error message>' in the logs, not 'could not connect to lightwalletd'. This makes it harder to triage whether the failure is DB corruption or a network partition. Maintenance consequence: when adding new lightwalletd calls in send_payment, a contributor following the existing pattern will map them all to Db, further muddying the error taxonomy.
close_reason: Duplicate of nie-3om.1, which is now fixed: latest_height() correctly maps to SendPaymentError::Connect.
